scene_prompt: cozy bedroom at night, soft pink-purple LED glow behind the wall clock, warm fairy-light bokeh, moody cinematic ambiance

shots.prompt: slow cinematic push-in toward the flower wall clock, LED glow pulsing softly, dust particles in light
smooth glide across the clock face revealing the details, fairy lights twinkle in the background
slow pull-back revealing the cozy room around the clock, warm inviting atmosphere

vo_text: Kamarmu butuh ini! Jam dinding bunga tulip dengan lampu LED, bikin suasana malam makin aesthetic dan cozy. Cuma tiga puluh empat ribuan! Klik link sekarang, keburu kehabisan!
